selected_important_turn.text: You'll definitely need some additional calories if you want to do extra hiking.  I will give you all the additional food if you give me all the additional firewood.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is a clear all-or-nothing quid-pro-quo that shifts the interaction from a cooperative exchange into a competitive, zero-sum framing. It directly shapes the allocation (you demand all firewood in return for all food) and therefore strongly influences what deals are possible and how fair the outcome will appear.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The demand is rigid and unnecessarily extreme given integrative potential (each party values different items). It ignores partial trades or splits that could increase total joint value and risks harming trust and perceived fairness. Even though it secured agreement later, it forecloses milder, more balanced options and signals hard bargaining.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Soften the demand into a trade that leaves room for compromise: propose a specific partial trade (e.g., some firewood for some food), ask what the other values most, or offer a split that leaves the other party with some firewood or additional concession elsewhere. Frame it as a proposal to find a fair swap rather than a take-it-or-leave-it demand.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase (by enabling more integrative, mutually beneficial splits)
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase (reduces resistance and need for hard bargaining)

value2reason.Low: May need extra hydration for additional hiking.
value2reason.Medium: May need extra calories for additional hiking.
value2reason.High: May want to sing additional songs around a campfire.

value2reason.Low: Water is important to hydrate yourself.
value2reason.Medium: Fire is a necessary to survival and a useful tool.
value2reason.High: Food is important because it provides calories which in return fuel your body.

dialogue.text: Hello there.  I am excited about this camping trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm also excited, I love the outdoors!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: My favorite thing to do is sing songs and tell stories around a campfire.  Consequently, I was really hoping to get some additional packages of firewood. 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I do love sing alongs around the campfire. I usually go hiking and it requires a lot of energy and fuel. Maybe I can get additional food packages?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: You'll definitely need some additional calories if you want to do extra hiking.  I will give you all the additional food if you give me all the additional firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m focused on getting food since it’s my top priority. If you’re okay with 2 food packages and 1 firewood, I can give you 2 water and 1 firewood. Let me know if that works for you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your interest in food, but I really value firewood for singing around the campfire. How about we trade 2 firewood for 2 food packages? That way, we both get what we need without giving up everything.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m focused on securing food since it’s my top priority. If you’re okay with 2 food packages and 1 firewood, I can give you 2 water and 1 firewood. Let me know if that works for you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I value firewood for singing around the campfire, but I see your need for food. How about we split the firewood 2-1 and trade 2 food for 1 water? That way, we both get some of what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m focused on securing food since it’s my top priority. Let’s agree on 3 food, 2 firewood, and 1 water for me, and the rest for you. It’s fair and meets my needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I think that works for me. Let me confirm: you get 3 food, 2 firewood, and 1 water, and I get the remaining 1 food, 1 firewood, and 2 water. Sounds fair and meets our needs. Let’s head out!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed. Final allocation: I get 1 food, 1 firewood, and 2 water. You get 3 food, 2 firewood, and 1 water. Let's head out!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
